name: TMA home screen minimalism and visual polish
description: Refine visual elements on the TMA Home screen to achieve a cleaner, more minimalist iOS-like aesthetic. Soften typography weights from heavy 800/700 to premium 700/600, reduce shadow opacity for a lighter card appearance, clean up spacing/margins, optimize status pill proportions, and replace cluttered double section headings with a single elegant title.

planned: Used `using-skills` first, then stated an explicit inline plan for Level 1 visual layout and style improvements.
Read `apps/tma/DESIGN.md`, `apps/tma/src/index.css`, and `apps/tma/src/routes/home.tsx` to align styles with visual specs.
Ran GitNexus impact analysis on `HomePage` symbol, and later on `TmaPageShell` function symbol showing critical risk, keeping modifications highly localized.
artifacts: Soften card shadows in `index.css` by reducing opacity to `rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.03)` for `--tma-shadow` and `rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.02)` for `--tma-shadow-soft`.

Reduced visual weight of typography: clamps body amount weight from 800 to 700, insight title weight from 800 to 600, monogram text from 800 to 600, and shortcut/household header tags from 700 to 600.
Resized and optimized status badges (`.tma-status-pill`) to be more compact: padding `4px 8px`, font size `11px`, and weight `500`.
Increased breathing space between sections by updating `.tma-section` margin-top from `20px` to `26px`.
Reduced shortcut card layout min-height to `112px` and inner gap to `10px` for a much sleeker grid alignment.

Removed visually redundant double-header structures on the home screen, replacing them with a single clean section header ('Lối tắt', 'Gia đình', 'Lịch sử gần đây') at `font-size: 16px` and `font-weight: 600`.
Avoided repeating month names in the header by cleaning up the profile card subtitle.

Resolved a critical back navigation loop bug in `TmaPageShell` by utilizing `window.history.state.idx` to determine if we can trigger natural history back (`navigate(-1)`) rather than pushing new redundant pages onto the stack.
verification: Ran `./init.sh lint` and `./init.sh typecheck` to confirm zero script, style, or typing regressions.
Executed `./init.sh` to run the full parallel verification pipeline successfully.
Executed final `gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: 'all')` to track modified files and styles.

notes: All changes are purely CSS styling tweaks and Home page template cleanup. The mock data schemas and routing structures remain untouched.
